name: Green Beans Braised with Mint & Potatoes
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Fresh green beans, trimmed and cut
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the olive oil and margarine mixture in an enameled pan.
2. Add the tomato juice or sauce to the pan.
3. Incorporate the green beans and parsley into the pan with enough water to almost cover them.
4. Place the potato slices between the green beans, partially cover the pan.
5. Simmer for 25 minutes, stirring occasionally and seasoning with salt and pepper.
6. Stir in the chopped mint.
7. Cook uncovered until the beans and potatoes are fork tender (about 10 more minutes).
8. If necessary, reduce the sauce to one cup by boiling it down in a small pan, then combine with the beans and potatoes.
9. Sprinkle with additional fresh mint and serve warm.
This dish pairs well with grilled chops, fish, or egg dishes but is equally delicious as a main course with cheese.
